Tests for communication session components in Pebble firmware, including kernel receiver, endpoints, and protocols.


## Files
- **[test_default_kernel_receiver.c](test_default_kernel_receiver.c.md)**: Tests for the default kernel receiver implementation in the Pebble firmware, including handling multiple sessions and race conditions.
- **[test_meta_endpoint.c](test_meta_endpoint.c.md)**: Tests for the meta endpoint in the communication session, including initialization and message handling.
- **[test_session.c](test_session.c.md)**: Tests for communication session functionality in the Pebble firmware, including session management and transport operations.
- **[test_session_receive_router.c](test_session_receive_router.c.md)**: Tests for the session receive router in the Pebble firmware, including handling of various endpoint scenarios and message payloads.
- **[test_session_remote_version.c](test_session_remote_version.c.md)**: Tests for the remote version protocol in communication sessions, using fakes and stubs for dependencies.
- **[test_session_send_buffer.c](test_session_send_buffer.c.md)**: Tests for the session send buffer functionality in the Pebble firmware communication session.
- **[test_session_send_queue.c](test_session_send_queue.c.md)**: Tests for the session send queue functionality in the Pebble firmware, including job management and memory handling.
- **[wscript](wscript.md)**: Build script for testing communication session services in the Pebble firmware.
